title: Clip it! Vanilla
description: The Clip it! Vanilla MC Modpack.
body:
# Clip it! Vanilla

The Clip it! Vanilla modpack stays faithful to the Vanilla experience while looking to improve the graphics, immersion, and performance of the game. The modpack is mostly client-side, but does include some server-side tweaks.

This pack is necessary to play on the Clip it! Vanilla MC server - but is also more than suitable for singleplayer worlds.

# Special Thanks & Credits
This modpack makes use of the excellent Vanilla Tweaks: https://vanillatweaks.net/.
